creator: pmh@komma.de
text:
The device is recognized by the kernel. Blanking of CD-RW media
works, writing tracks seemingly works, fixating doesn't.
Same for CD-R media, fixating impossible.

Fix: 

If I knew, I'd provide a fix ;-)
How-To-Repeat: 
# burncd -f /dev/acd0c blank
